name: karvey
description: Karvey Method (Afán, Selknam): spec-driven development pipeline of 12 phases + a cross-cutting layer of 12 support skills. Stack-agnostic (web, mobile, desktop, CLI, API, embedded). PRD, EARS, mockup, design, architecture, IaC+CI/CD, QA with a security gate, ordered deployment with canary, semver versioning. A synthesis of first-hand experience + Kiro + gstack.
